case_title: BRUCE TERRENCE SCHAUER VS. MONTIE BOWERR LIEBERT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHAUER, BRUCE TERRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT LIEBERT, MONTIE BOWERR AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MBL BUILDERS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHAUER, BRUCE TERRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIEBERT, MONTIE BOWERR AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MBL BUILDERS $3,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,330.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
